title: Add Dwarf Shrimp
description: Introduce cherry shrimp to your planted tank as a cleanup crew.

dialogue.text: Shrimp are great for beginners and help keep algae under control. Let's get some settled in your tank.
Drip acclimate the shrimp for about thirty minutes so they adjust slowly to your water parameters.
Gently release them into the tank and dim the lights to reduce stress.
Feed lightly and provide plenty of moss or hiding spots. Stable parameters will help them thrive and multiply.
With proper care your shrimp colony will grow and keep the tank tidy.
